hero.bio: Motivated Software Developer committed to continuous learning and active participation in development projects for both Backend and Frontend. Capable of creating scalable, user-centered solutions.

swiftcontrol.label: Full-stack Developer
swiftcontrol.title: SwiftControl
swiftcontrol.description: I had the pleasant opportunity to participate in full-stack development projects at SwiftControl, contributing my knowledge mainly in design and innovative features applied to business logic. I also worked as a team with other developers, putting my fast and continuous development skills to the test.

brunchosos.label: Web Developer
brunchosos.title: Brunchosos Website
brunchosos.description: I developed a website for a coffee shop with a Coffee & Brunch theme in Pitalito-Huila, Colombia. I used my knowledge in generating static websites with updated technologies and advanced AI tools. The product was developed with a focus on user experience, optimization, and fidelity to the design described by the client.

about.paragraph1: I am a developer passionate about technology and innovation. Since an early age I have been fascinated by the world of software development.
about.paragraph2: I love learning new technologies and facing complex challenges. In my free time, I contribute to open source projects to learn from the knowledge of the community.
about.paragraph3: My goal is to create applications that not only work well, but also provide an exceptional user experience.

navidad.title: Armando la Navidad
navidad.description: Developed an interactive game using exclusively CSS (without frameworks or JavaScript) to handle layouts, typography and colors. Created complex animations and smooth transitions, as well as real randomization logic and CSS transformations, ensuring responsive design.

news.title: News Portal
news.description: Built a modern, responsive web application that consumes the News API to display real-time information. Optimized performance through RTK Query for efficient cache management and global application state, and designed an advanced user interface with synchronized light/dark mode.

ui_clone.title: UI Web Cloning
ui_clone.description: Applied fundamental UX/UI principles to faithfully replicate an existing web interface, focusing on the precision of spacing, typography and visual hierarchy.

kanban.title: Kanban Flow
kanban.description: Developed a Kanban-style Full Stack web application with secure authentication, complete CRUD management and Markdown content editing. Implemented advanced interactive features such as drag and drop and real-time chat with WebSockets. REST API with NestJS and TypeORM, Docker and deployment on AWS EC2. (In progress...)

portfolio.title: Personal Portfolio
portfolio.description: Built my personal portfolio using React, Tailwind CSS implementing i18next, react-i18next and i18next-browser-languagedetector.

contact.subtitle: Let's work together on your next project
contact.name: Your Name
contact.successDesc: Thanks for reaching out. I'll get back to you soon.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
contact.ratelimit: You've reached the limit of 3 messages per hour. Try again in {{minutes}} min.

footer.madeWith: Made with React + Next.js + Tailwind CSS
